summary: 针对选中的 Feed Valve (valve-1) 生成局部修复提案：修正负值压力降参数以解决 VALVE_PRESSURE_DROP_INVALID 错误。全局质量平衡警告 (GLOBAL_BALANCE_GAP) 因证据不足（未选中关联流股、无具体残差分布信息）暂不生成拓扑修改提案。

answers.text: 检测到 Feed Valve 的压力降参数为负值 (-15 kPa)，与阀门节流方向冲突。建议将 pressure_drop_kpa 修正为正值，以消除求解错误。全局质量平衡存在 0.24 的残差，但当前选择集仅包含阀门单元，缺乏足够信息判断是阀门参数问题还是下游分离器配置问题，建议先应用局部修复后重新求解观察。

issues.message: Feed Valve pressure_drop_kpa is negative and conflicts with the intended throttling direction.
The current flowsheet still shows a global mass balance gap after the last solve attempt.

proposed_actions.title: 修正 Feed Valve 压力降参数符号
proposed_actions.rationale: 阀门压力降应为正值表示节流损失。当前配置 -15 kPa 违反物理约束，直接导致求解器报错。修正为 +15 kPa 可消除 VALVE_PRESSURE_DROP_INVALID 错误，使阀门模型符合预期压降方向。

citations.label: 诊断 VALVE_PRESSURE_DROP_INVALID
citations.excerpt: Feed Valve pressure_drop_kpa is negative and conflicts with the intended throttling direction.

citations.label: 诊断 GLOBAL_BALANCE_GAP
citations.excerpt: The current flowsheet still shows a global mass balance gap after the last solve attempt.
